title: [Control systems] Siemens security advisory (AV26-566)
description: On June 9, 2026, Siemens published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were updates for the following products:
products: SINEC INS   versions prior to V1.0 SP2 Update 6
Siemens Products   multiple versions and models
SIPROTEC 5 - CP100 / CP150 / CP200 / CP300 / Devices   all versions
Totally Integrated Automation Portal (TIA Portal)   all versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
